XR unavailable
Loading Gaussian Splat...

Controls

  • Left Mouse: Orbit
  • Right Mouse: Pan
  • Scroll: Zoom
  • Double-click: Focus on region
  • F: Frame scene
  • R: Toggle auto-rotation
  • E: Toggle model-only rotation
  • [: Move ruler closer to model
  • ]: Move ruler away from model
  • D: Toggle depth ruler
  • O: Toggle orientation plot
  • T: Toggle theme
  • V: Enter or exit VR
  • P: Enter or exit passthrough
  • Esc: Exit XR
